author: u/Midnightpassenger
title: What is your wildest Tinder date story?
body: I went out with this guy who seemed pretty smart and nice. He talked about great authors, art, and literature, so I was a bit impressed.
The first date was okay, but he bluntly said, 'Sorry for not kissing you. I've been told I'm a bad kisser and dumped over it.' He also let an 'I love you' slip out, but it was clearly an accident.
So I was like, okay, not a good start, but I kept talking to him. We kissed, and he was terrible, but I decided to give him a shot, and we met to go to a museum together the following day.

During the whole car ride, he was a completely different person. He put his music obnoxiously loud and didn't engage with me. He kept saying how he thought reading 'was a waste of time,' went on about how he was a 'materialist,' and kept rubbing his crotch on me while I was trying to observe the art in the museum.
When he tried to kiss me again, he got my face all wet and couldn't fit his tongue in my mouth. He sat by a bench, and I told him, 'Hey, I don't think this is working.'
He got mad, yelled at me, and started screaming in public about how he had a big dick, and he was a great kisser. I was the one who 'didn't get it.' I ran out of there fast.
narration: So I matched with this guy on Tinder. He seemed CULTURED — talked about great authors, literature, art. I was actually impressed. First date was... fine. Kind of. He apologized for not kissing me. Said he'd been TOLD he's a bad kisser and that girls dump him over it. He also accidentally said 'I love you.' Out loud. On the first date. Red flags everywhere — but I gave him a second chance anyway. We went to a museum. And in the car on the way there, he was a COMPLETELY different person. Obnoxiously loud music. Wouldn't talk to me. Kept saying reading was a 'waste of time.' Then at the museum, he kept rubbing himself on me while I was literally just trying to look at the ART. When he leaned in to kiss me again, he soaked my ENTIRE face. I finally told him — hey, I don't think this is working. He stood up from the bench, and he started SCREAMING. In the middle of a public museum. About how he was a GREAT kisser. And had a big d***. And that I just — quote — 'didn't get it.' I ran out of there so fast.
